narrative:
On July 4, 2026, the CPUC's Energy Efficiency proceeding (R.25-04-010) experienced significant activity, with numerous comments filed by stakeholders. This indicates an active phase in the proceeding, requiring close attention to upcoming proposals and decisions that will shape future energy efficiency program design and implementation.

Concurrently, the CEC announced the completion of the first Equitable Building Decarbonization Project in Southern California on July 4, 2026. This milestone highlights progress in deploying decarbonization solutions with an equity focus.

Clients should note the ongoing developments in R.25-04-010, as these will directly influence future energy efficiency opportunities and compliance requirements.
